hooks.command: bash -lc 'test -f jstack.config.json || echo "[jstack] Run: jstack setup or /jstack:setup" >&2'

node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='jstack.config.json';if(!fs.existsSync(p))process.exit(0);let j;try{j=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));}catch(e){process.exit(0);}const id=String(j.session&&j.session.current_session_id||'').trim();if(!id)console.error('[jstack] No session id in jstack.config.json — run session init (e.g. jstack:init-session) when you start work.');"
